description: A session log dashboard for OpenClaw — parses real JSONL session logs from all 5 agents and visualizes them with per-agent breakdowns, cost tracking, tool call heatmaps, and per-turn session timelines
features: Parses 1,628 real OpenClaw sessions across 5 agents (Eve, Wilson, C-3PO, Pepper, Radar)
Overview dashboard with total sessions, messages, tokens, and cost ($434 total)
Stacked area chart showing daily cost by agent (last 30 days)
Sortable/filterable session list with pagination (sort by cost, tokens, messages, duration, date)
Session detail modal with full turn timeline (model, tools, thinking, cost per turn)
Real data from JSONL logs — not mock data
Data extraction script (scripts/extract.cjs) for refreshing data from live logs
